Stop.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if git diff --name-only | grep -q myinsights/; then git add myinsights/ && git commit -m "docs(insights): auto-commit knowledge base updates" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if git diff --name-only | grep -q .claude/feature-roadmap.json; then git add .claude/feature-roadmap.json && git commit -m "docs(roadmap): auto-commit feature status updates" 2>/dev/null; fi'
bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if git diff --name-only | grep -q docs/plans/; then git add docs/plans/ && git commit -m "docs(plans): auto-commit plan updates" 2>/dev/null; fi'
